question: What was our revenue last month?
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped') AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP(DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)) AND created_at < TIMESTAMP(DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), MONTH))
analyst_notes: Revenue counts only items with status Complete or Shipped. Cancelled and Returned items are excluded (they inflate the naive sum by roughly a quarter). Processing items count only toward 'projected revenue' and must be labeled as such when included.
author: artem
